_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells

_contextSnippet: statistically significant and dose dependent reduction in EdU uptake in VS cells that express Neurod1 relative to those treated with EV. Thus, gene transfer with Neurod1 expressing viral vectors reduces human VS proliferation in vitro
resourceName: Primary human vestibular schwannoma (VS) cell cultures
details: Showed statistically significant and dose-dependent reduction in proliferation (EdU uptake) when transduced with Neurod1-expressing vectors
